name: anti-track
description: A lightweight Chrome extension that automatically removes UTM tracking identifiers from URLs before you visit a page.

scripts.build: mkdir -p dist/popup && esbuild src/background.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/background.js && esbuild src/content.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/content.js && esbuild src/popup/popup.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/popup/popup.js && cp src/popup/popup.html dist/popup/ && cp src/popup/popup.css dist/popup/ && cp manifest.json dist/ && cp rules.json dist/ && cp -r icons dist/
